mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, product_id, product_title_snapshot, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, buyer_name, buyer_contact, lookup_hash, buyer_remark, status, closed_reason, closed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM shop_order WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM shop_order WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM shop_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE shop_order SET status = 'CLOSED', closed_reason = #{reason}, closed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
